---
title: "data_cleaning_ventilation"
output: html_document
date: "2026-05-12"
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)

hourly_1 <- readRDS("raw_data/observations.rds")

hourly_1 <- hourly_1 %>% 
  mutate(VariableName = tolower(str_replace_all(VariableName, "�", "e")), 
         VariableAbbreviation = tolower(str_replace_all(VariableAbbreviation, "�", "e")), 
         StringValue = tolower(str_replace_all(StringValue, "�", "e")))
```

```{r}
hourly_1 %>% 
  select(VariableAbbreviation, VariableName) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  View(title = "1")

hourly_1 %>% 
  select(VariableAbbreviation, VariableName, ValueUnit) %>%
  distinct() %>% 
  filter(ValueUnit == "cmH2O") %>%
  View(title = "1")
```

```{r}
# VT exp

vt_exp <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("vt(m)", 
                                     "vtexp(m)"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("vt(m)", 
                                                                   "vtexp(m)"),
                                       "vtexp", 
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))

# VT prescribed
vt <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("vt(r)", 
                                     "vt"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("vt(r)", 
                                                                   "vt"),
                                       "vt", 
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))

# PEEP
peep <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("peep",
                                     "pep2(r)",
                                     #    "pep(m)",
                                     "pep(r)"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("peep",
                                                                   "pep2(r)",
                                                                   #  "pep(m)",
                                                                   "pep(r)"), 
                                       "peep", 
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))

# Pplat
pplat <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("pplat",
                                     "peplat(m)"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("pplat", 
                                                                   "peplat(m)"),
                                       "pplat", 
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))

# PSV
psv <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c(
    # "peai(r)", Not correct. Nonsense values and incorrect unit
    "bipapp1(r)",
    "$ peai vsai"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("bipapp1(r)",
                                                                   "$ peai vsai"),
                                       "psv",
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  )
  )

# Pcontrol
pcontrol <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c(
    "pecontrol(r)"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("pecontrol(r)"),
                                       "pcontrol",
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))

hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("p0.1")) %>% 
  group_by(PatientID) %>% 
  View()

# Mode
mode <- hourly_1 %>% 
  filter(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("mode evita",
                                     "mode evita.",
                                     "evita mode",
                                     "mode erica",
                                     "mode evita 4",
                                     "draeger mode",
                                     "v500 mode",
                                     "v500 mode.",
                                     "modevita2(m)",
                                     "mode evita4",
                                     "mode evita 2"
  )) %>%
  mutate(VariableAbbreviation = ifelse(VariableAbbreviation %in% c("mode evita",
                                                                   "mode evita.",
                                                                   "evita mode",
                                                                   "mode erica",
                                                                   "mode evita 4",
                                                                   "draeger mode",
                                                                   "v500 mode",
                                                                   "v500 mode.",
                                                                   "modevita2(m)",
                                                                   "mode evita4",
                                                                   "mode evita 2"),
                                       "mode", 
                                       VariableAbbreviation
  ))
```

```{r}
ventilation_final <- bind_rows(vt_exp, vt, peep, pplat, mode, psv, pcontrol)
```

```{r}
# Add admission time

### import patient final

ventilation_final <- ventilation_final %>% 
  merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), 
        by = "PatientID")

```

# Examples
```{r}
library(ggpubr)
library(tidyverse)

ventilation_final <- ventilation_final %>%
  arrange(PatientID, ValueTime) %>% 
  group_by(PatientID, VariableAbbreviation) %>% 
  mutate(icu_hour = as.numeric(round(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>% 
  ungroup()

ventilation_final <- ventilation_final %>%
  filter(VariableAbbreviation != "mode") %>%
  select(PatientID, VariableAbbreviation, NumValue, icu_hour) %>%
  group_by(PatientID, VariableAbbreviation, icu_hour) %>% 
  mutate(NumValue = median(NumValue, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
  distinct() %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = "VariableAbbreviation", values_from = "NumValue") %>%
  arrange(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
  merge(ventilation_final %>%
          filter(VariableAbbreviation == "mode") %>%
          select(PatientID, VariableAbbreviation, StringValue, icu_hour) %>%
          group_by(PatientID, VariableAbbreviation, icu_hour) %>% 
          slice(1) %>%
          ungroup() %>%
          pivot_wider(names_from = "VariableAbbreviation", values_from = "StringValue") %>%
          arrange(PatientID, icu_hour), 
        by = c("PatientID", "icu_hour"), 
        all = TRUE
  ) %>%
  arrange(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
  View()
```

```{r}
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)

rds.files <- list.files(path = "data_extraction/hourly", pattern = "^hourly_2", full.names = TRUE)
patient_final <- readRDS("data_extraction/patient/patient_final.rds")

res.data_1 <- map(rds.files[1:3], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_2 <- map(rds.files[4:6], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_3 <- map(rds.files[7:10], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_4 <- map(rds.files[11:13], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_5 <- map(rds.files[14:16], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_6 <- map(rds.files[17:19], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

res.data_7 <- map(rds.files[20:22], function(x){
  
  data <- readRDS(x)
  
  data <- data %>%
    merge(patient_final %>% select(PatientID, AdmTime), by = "PatientID") %>%
    group_by(PatientID) %>%
    mutate(icu_hour = round(as.numeric(difftime(ValueTime, AdmTime, units = "hours")))) %>%
    group_by(PatientID, icu_hour) %>%
    summarise(VariableAbbreviation, 
              VariableName,
              ValueUnit, 
              StringValue,
              NumValue = median(NumValue)) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    distinct()
  
  return(data)
  
}, .progress = TRUE)

saveRDS(res.data_1, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_1.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_2, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_2.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_3, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_3.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_4, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_4.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_5, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_5.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_6, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_6.rds")
saveRDS(res.data_7, "data_extraction/hourly/res_data_7.rds")
```

```{r}
rds.files <- list.files(path = "data_extraction/hourly", pattern = "^res_data_", full.names = TRUE)

hourly <- map_dfr(rds.files, readRDS, .progress = TRUE)


hourly %>% 
  mutate(VariableName = tolower(str_replace_all(VariableName, "�", "e")), 
         VariableAbbreviation = tolower(str_replace_all(VariableAbbreviation, "�", "e"))) %>%
  filter(VariableAbbreviation == "pep(r)")

```
